title: Etsy Gross Merchandise Sales Drop 8.6% in 4th Quarter 2024
text: Etsy reported consolidated GMS declined 6.8% year-over-year in Q4 2024, with the core marketplace experiencing an 8.6% decline. Active buyers on the marketplace declined 2.6% to 89.6 million, marking a notable contraction from the prior year. The company reactivated a record 9.8 million lapsed buyers, up 1.3% from the prior year, and acquired 6.9 million new buyers in Q4. Active sellers experienced a sharper drop of 20% to 5.6 million, attributed to new onboarding fees and enhanced trust and safety initiatives. GMS per active buyer declined 3.5% year-over-year to $121, indicating that fewer buyers are spending less on the platform. The core Etsy marketplace faced significant headwinds from weak discretionary spending, a shorter holiday season, category mix shifts, and a highly promotional and competitive retail environment. Despite declining GMS, Etsy achieved record Q4 revenue of $852.2 million, a 1.2% increase year-over-year, primarily driven by advertising revenue expansion.
